details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectory reports/board/ is missing.
reports/board/ directory does not exist. Governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to both be present.

Moltbot code directory /workspace/moltbot/ still exists with active Python modules: board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py. Additionally, moltbot-related scripts found: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py. Per governance policy, Clawdbot/Moltbot code must not be reintroduced.
